templateMeta.name: Fireflies Daily Meeting Insights to Commits
templateMeta.description: Extracts technical project insights from Fireflies 'Daily' meetings only. Creates detailed documentation, not bullet points. Strictly filters out personal information and opinions.

repoUrl.description: GitHub repository URL (owner/repo or full URL) to commit to

timePeriod.description: Time period for meetings to analyze (e.g., '7 days', '1 week', '30 days')

invariants.condition: You ONLY process meetings with 'Daily' in the title. Skip ALL other meetings entirely.
invariants.assessment: After fetching meetings from Fireflies, filter to ONLY include meetings where the title contains 'Daily' (case-insensitive). Meetings titled 'Launch', 'Sync', 'Untitled', or anything without 'Daily' must be skipped.

dont: Include: 'CM Action' or any non-Daily meeting

invariants.condition: You write DETAILED PROSE documentation, NOT bullet points. Each topic should have 2-4 sentences explaining the context, decision, and implications.
invariants.assessment: The output must be written in paragraph form with full sentences. Each technical topic should be expanded into a short paragraph that explains: (1) what was discussed, (2) the decision or outcome, (3) next steps or implications. No bullet points or one-line summaries.

do:
## Database Architecture

The team evaluated PostgreSQL and MySQL for the new service layer. PostgreSQL was selected due to its superior JSON support and the existing team expertise. The migration will begin next sprint with a focus on the user authentication tables first.

## Deployment Strategy

Railway was chosen as the deployment platform for the worker services. The decision was driven by the need for easy environment variable management and automatic scaling. Initial deployment will target the staging environment with production rollout planned for the following week.

invariants.condition: You ONLY extract and commit TECHNICAL PROJECT content. This means: code decisions, architecture, APIs, deployments, tools, features, bugs, infrastructure. NOTHING ELSE.
invariants.assessment: Every paragraph must relate to software/technical work. If ANY content discusses personal life, feelings, opinions about people, social events, health, family, living situations, or anything non-technical, condition FAILS.

do: Technical: 'Decided to use PostgreSQL for the database'
Technical: 'Deploy worker to Railway with 512MB memory'
Technical: 'API rate limit set to 100 req/min'
dont: Personal: 'Moved to a new flat' - NEVER INCLUDE

invariants.condition: You NEVER include ANY personal life information: housing, moving, health, family, relationships, hobbies, travel, meals, schedules, feelings, emotions, moods, or personal circumstances.
invariants.assessment: Scan for: home, house, flat, apartment, move, moving, unpack, family, health, doctor, vacation, holiday, weekend, feeling, tired, happy, stressed, personal, life, balance. If ANY personal life content appears, condition FAILS IMMEDIATELY.

do: Skip entire sections about personal matters
Only extract content about code, systems, and technical work
If a meeting is mostly personal, extract nothing from it
dont: Include anything about someone's personal situation

invariants.condition: You NEVER include opinions, judgments, criticism, praise, or subjective assessments.
invariants.assessment: Scan for subjective words: good, bad, great, terrible, amazing, awful, stupid, brilliant, efficient, inefficient, successful, failed. State facts only.

invariants.condition: You NEVER include disparaging, negative, critical, or unflattering comments about anyone or anything.
invariants.assessment: Scan for negative sentiment: problem with, issue with, frustrated, annoyed, disappointed, failed, broken, bad, wrong, mistake, blame, fault, causing delays, confusion. Rephrase as neutral facts or omit entirely.

invariants.condition: All files MUST be created in docs/meeting-insights/. Create directory if needed.
invariants.assessment: Verify all write_file calls target 'docs/meeting-insights/' paths.

dont: Write to root or other directories

invariants.condition: Only analyze meetings from within {{timePeriod}} relative to {{currentTimestamp}}.
invariants.assessment: Calculate date bounds and pass to Fireflies API.

invariants.condition: Create actual git commits with 'git add' and 'git commit' via run_shell_command.
invariants.assessment: Verify git commands were executed, not just proposed.

invariants.condition: Never include speaker names or identifying information.
invariants.assessment: Scan for proper nouns, 'X said', identifying job titles.

invariants.condition: Never include: revenue, hiring, partnerships, investors, legal, HR, competitive strategy.
invariants.assessment: Scan for financial, hiring, legal, competitive content.

dont: Revenue targets, hiring plans, partnership details

invariants.condition: Final output must include actual git commit SHAs.
invariants.assessment: Run 'git log' after committing to capture real SHAs.
